# Raymond King — Marketing Systems Builder

> Raymond King builds practical marketing systems that help business owners
> capture leads, automate follow-up, support appointment booking, and improve
> reporting. The work spans conversion websites, CRM workflows, email/SMS
> automation, booking flows, and attribution dashboards — connected into one
> lead-to-revenue workflow rather than disconnected tools.

## Who this is for
Business owners, founders, agencies, and operators who get traffic but lose
leads to manual follow-up, missed bookings, or unclear reporting.

## Core offer: Lead-to-Revenue Growth System
A connected 5-step demo stack:
1. Capture intent — conversion landing page + form capture
2. Book instantly — scheduling / booking flow
3. CRM + lead scoring — route and prioritize leads automatically
4. Nurture automatically — email & SMS follow-up sequences
5. Report attribution — dashboard tying Google Analytics, CRM revenue, and ad spend to channel-level reporting

## Services
- Lead-to-revenue growth systems
- Conversion websites and landing pages
- AI-assisted workflow support
- CRM and follow-up automation (email + SMS)
- Analytics and attribution dashboards
- Interactive tools and product demos

## Demo note
Public demos use representative or simulated data where needed. Production
builds require access to the client's live tools such as GA4, CRM, ad accounts,
email/SMS platforms, and booking software.
